findings.raw: Two operators at different desks both said they couldn't find a guest by name during the morning rush and had to ask for the booking code.
findings.problem_statement: Operators can't locate a reservation by guest name, so the queue stalls while the guest digs for the booking code.

findings.raw: A duty manager wished the override screen showed the operator's reason inline.
findings.problem_statement: Managers approve overrides without seeing the reason, so they can't judge or defend the decision.

findings.raw: One operator said they'd prefer the primary button to be green instead of indigo.
findings.problem_statement: One operator dislikes the primary button colour.
